name: Galilee
oracleText:
Galilee enters the battlefield tapped.
{T}: Add {U} or {G}.
{2}, {T}: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one into your hand and the other into your graveyard.
flavorText: "Follow me, and I will make you fishers of men." — Matthew 4:19
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. First-pass mechanics added in this pass; mana, colors, and rules text remain provisional.
title: Waters of Calling
